title: Stage map for real Workbench General Task intake and active-state registration

stages.title: Define Workbench intake and active-state contract
stages.purpose: Specify exact repo-safe artifacts and fields for Workbench General Task intake and active_state.json.
scope_in: normalized General Task artifact path rules
expected_outputs: schema/state contract documented in modernized task or schema file
required_checks: active state schema has ready_for_agent=false invariant
no downstream stage map/servitor scope included
stages.pass_condition: Contract clearly defines active-state-only registration and cannot be confused with agent readiness.
stages.fail_condition: Registration remains ambiguous or READY_FOR_AGENT can become true.

stages.title: Implement real Workbench General Task intake persistence
stages.purpose: Make Owner-entered General Task data persist as a real normalized artifact instead of placeholder UI success.
scope_in: write deterministic repo-safe General Task artifact
stages.pass_condition: Save/intake produces persisted artifact plus receipt and validation pass.
stages.fail_condition: Workbench claims success without artifact, receipt, and validation.

stages.title: Write active_state.json from real intake and selected task
stages.purpose: Create stale-aware dashboard active state with exact IDs, git truth, hashes, and READY_FOR_AGENT=false.
stages.pass_condition: active_state.json proves local Workbench state only and remains stale-aware.
stages.fail_condition: State lacks provenance, becomes stale-hidden, or implies worker readiness.

stages.title: Add checker and receipt guard layer
stages.purpose: Prevent fake green by checking placeholder UI, repo purity, UTF-8, Speculum import, and active state.
required_checks: Speculum review is imported and reflected
stages.pass_condition: All required guards produce explicit pass/fail evidence and Owner manual gate remains required.
stages.fail_condition: Any checker missing, fake-green-prone, or hiding warning/blocker state.

final_stage_map_pass_condition: Stage map has exactly 4 bounded stages
Speculum stage review is required before registration
Speculum stage review import exists and is tied to exact local_task_id and stage_map_sha256
Machine-checkable intake and active-state contracts must exist before registration
repo purity guard must pass before registration
UTF-8/mojibake guard must pass before registration
Owner manual gate remains required after checker pass

required_registration_conditions.condition: Speculum stage review response is imported and bound to the exact reviewed_local_task_id and stage_map_sha256.
required_registration_conditions.evidence_required: SPECULUM_STAGE_REVIEW_IMPORT_RECEIPT_V0_1 with local_task_id, stage_map_sha256, review_verdict, final_recommendation, imported_at_utc, git_head.

required_registration_conditions.condition: Stage map validates as exactly 4 bounded stages with no readiness escalation.
Machine-checkable intake and active-state contracts exist.
required_registration_conditions.evidence_required: astronomicon_contract_schema_validate_v0_1 exit 0 and schema paths/hashes included in check-run receipt.

required_registration_conditions.condition: WORKBENCH_ACTIVE_STATE_ONLY remains the only registration kind.

required_registration_conditions.evidence_required: REPO_PURITY_RECEIPT_V0_1 showing no runtime/outbox/bundles/handoff/private context under E:\IMPERIUM and receipts under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT.

required_registration_conditions.condition: UTF-8/mojibake guard passes on touched artifacts.
required_registration_conditions.evidence_required: UTF8_MOJIBAKE_GUARD_RECEIPT_V0_1 with zero decode failures and zero mojibake hits.

required_registration_conditions.condition: Owner manual gate remains required after checker pass.
required_registration_conditions.evidence_required: Stage map and check-run receipt include owner_gate_required=true and no auto-registration/auto-agent execution flag.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Validate stage map structure, IDs, stage_count=4, ready_for_agent=false, registration_kind=WORKBENCH_ACTIVE_STATE_ONLY, owner_gate_required=true, and required pass/fail fields.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; validates exact local_task_id, 4 stage IDs, draft status before registration, ready_for_agent=false, no VM2/Inquisition/Servitor scope.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Non-zero exit; missing field; wrong ID; stage count drift; readiness escalation; scope-out violation; stale or mismatched git_head.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Ensure intake and active-state contracts are machine-checkable and include required invariants.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; schemas/contracts exist or existing equivalents are referenced; ready_for_agent=false invariant, stale_status model, source hashes, and provenance fields are enforced.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Only prose exists; schemas missing; stale_status undefined; ready_for_agent can be true/missing; provenance fields optional without justification.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Prove real intake persistence from Owner-entered General Task data to normalized artifact plus receipt.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; normalized General Task artifact written; required fields validate; sha256 generated; intake receipt under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT; no placeholder success path used.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: UI/API claims success without artifact, validation, sha256, and receipt; receipt written inside repo; raw unnormalized draft treated as canonical.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Validate active_state.json as local Workbench dashboard state with complete provenance and stale protection.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; active_state.json contains exact IDs, paths, sha256 values, git_head, commit_count, last_checked_at_utc, stale_status, ready_for_agent=false, authority_scope local to Astronomicon Workbench.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Missing provenance; stale timestamp; source hash mismatch; ready_for_agent true/missing; status implies worker readiness; VM2/Servitor/Inquisition field is created or queued.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Confirm this Speculum stage review has been imported and reflected before stage map registration.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; imported review artifact exists; reviewed_local_task_id and stage_map_sha256 match; verdict is not PENDING; final recommendation allows registration only after corrections.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Review not imported; SHA mismatch; PENDING verdict; response not tied to stage_map_sha256; registration attempted before import.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Detect broken encoding and mojibake in touched text artifacts.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; touched .md/.json/.html/.py files decode as UTF-8 and do not contain known mojibake patterns.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Decode failure; replacement characters; mojibake pattern hit; JSON parser rejects schema/state files.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Enforce repo purity and keep runtime/private/context artifacts outside E:\IMPERIUM.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; no runtime/outbox/bundles/handoff/private context files inside repo; receipts under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT; git status contains only expected repo files for this task.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Any E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT-like data inside repo; zip/bundle/outbox/runtime artifacts in repo; unexpected generated files; dirty state outside expected touched files.

required_checkers_from_speculum.purpose: Run the local corridor checkers as one bounded launcher and emit a single check-run receipt.
required_checkers_from_speculum.pass_condition: Exit 0; all required checkers PASS; receipt includes per-check command, exit_code, timestamps, git_head, source hashes, and Owner gate remains required.
required_checkers_from_speculum.failure_condition: Any child checker FAIL/BLOCKED; launcher hides warnings; receipt omits failed commands; checker run claims readiness for agent execution.

blockers_from_speculum.description: Stage map must not be registered until Speculum stage review is imported and tied to the exact stage_map_sha256.
blockers_from_speculum.required_resolution: Create/import SPECULUM_STAGE_REVIEW_IMPORT_RECEIPT_V0_1 and make the registration precheck fail if the imported review is missing, PENDING, or SHA-mismatched.

blockers_from_speculum.description: Contract output is currently allowed to be prose-only. That is not enforceable.
blockers_from_speculum.required_resolution: Add machine-checkable schema/contract artifacts or point to existing schema files and require the schema checker before Stage 02.

blockers_from_speculum.description: Real intake can still fake success unless the save path proves artifact, validation, sha256, and receipt.
blockers_from_speculum.required_resolution: Implement and require an intake E2E checker that fails on UI/API success without normalized artifact plus validation receipt.

blockers_from_speculum.description: active_state.json can become a fake authority if it lacks authority_scope and readiness invariants.
blockers_from_speculum.required_resolution: Require authority_scope=ASTRONOMICON_WORKBENCH_DASHBOARD_ONLY, registration_kind=WORKBENCH_ACTIVE_STATE_ONLY, ready_for_agent=false, and explicit false flags for VM2/Servitor/Inquisition.

blockers_from_speculum.description: Repo purity is a hard rule and must be machine-checked, not manually assumed.
blockers_from_speculum.required_resolution: Add repo-purity guard and receipt proving runtime/outbox/bundles/handoff/private context stayed under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT and not under E:\IMPERIUM.

blockers_from_speculum.description: Stage 04 is the only stage with medium breadth. It is acceptable only if bounded to this local task and implemented as guards, not a CI/Inquisition platform.
blockers_from_speculum.required_resolution: Keep Stage 04 as a guard layer for the Workbench corridor only. Split it if implementation tries to add full CI, dashboard redesign, VM2, or Inquisition behavior.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: Workbench Save/Validate/Decompose buttons show success while still executing placeholder code.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: Require no-placeholder action checker plus E2E proof of normalized artifact, validation exit 0, sha256, and intake receipt.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: active_state.json displays current-looking dashboard data from stale source files.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: Require last_checked_at_utc, stale_status enum, exact source paths, source sha256, git_head match, and stale-hidden failure.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: READY_FOR_AGENT becomes true indirectly through status labels, button labels, or registration wording.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: Schema/checkers must fail on ready_for_agent=true, AGENT_READY-like strings, Servitor handoff fields, VM2 queue fields, or dispatchable status.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: Speculum review exists as a downloaded/exported file but is not imported into the repo/context state.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: Require review import guard tied to exact local_task_id and stage_map_sha256 before registration.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: Receipts are created inside the clean repo, polluting Git and mixing runtime evidence with source truth.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: Repo-purity guard must scan for forbidden runtime/context/output paths under E:\IMPERIUM and require receipt output under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: UTF-8 checks pass on parser-valid JSON but Owner-facing Markdown/HUD text contains mojibake.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: Use strict UTF-8 decode plus mojibake pattern scan across touched .md, .json, .html, and .py files; include human-visible text fields in scan.

fake_green_risks_from_speculum.risk: Aggregated checker launcher reports green while child checker warnings are hidden.
fake_green_risks_from_speculum.mitigation: WORKBENCH_CHECK_RUN_RECEIPT must include per-check status and force overall FAIL/BLOCKED if any required checker fails or is missing.
